If this unit is [Assemble], deal +5% damage

[WhenUse] Lose 10 SP
If this unit is [Assemble], deal +10% damage

[WhenUse] Lose 15 SP
If this unit is [Assemble], deal +15% damage
If target is a <Mechanical Amalgam>, deal +10% damage
coinDescs: [OnSucceedAttack] Raise Stagger Threshold by 50% of damage dealt

[OnSucceedAttack] If target has 5+ [Laceration], inflict 5 [Combustion]
[EnemyKill] Gain 1 [HitResultUp] next turn

- If target is a <Mechanical Amalgam>, deal +10% damage

1100501.name: Mad Flame
1100501.desc: Heal 50% less SP from winning a clash or defeating an enemy.

1100521.name: Cornering
1100521.desc:
1 ally with the least SP deals +10% Blunt damage.
If said ally is below 0 SP, further boost their Blunt damage the lower their SP is. (Max 10%)

1100511.name: Mad Flame
1100511.desc:
Heal 50% less SP from winning a clash or defeating an enemy.
If 5 or more surviving units, including this unit, are 'N Corp. Fanatics', they deal +10% damage.
